channel.title: Smart Buyer Hub — Knowledge Hub
channel.description: Plain-English guides on home loans, deposits, refinancing and buying property in Australia.

item.title: The Bank of Mum and Dad: how a $35 billion 'lender' split first home buyers into two classes
item.description: Parental help is now the biggest predictor of who buys a home in Australia. Inside the Bank of Mum and Dad divide - and how a guarantor loan can help without a cash gift.

item.title: How much deposit do you really need to buy your first home?
item.description: 5%, 10% or 20%? The schemes, LMI and guarantor options explained — and what each really costs.

item.title: Self-employed and want a home loan? Here's how to get approved.
item.description: The documents, add-backs, low-doc options and lenders that turn a bank's "no" into a "yes".

item.title: Fixed vs variable: how to actually decide (without a crystal ball)
item.description: A calm framework for choosing between fixed, variable and split — based on your life, not guesswork.
